whyNow.signal: Actively announced a $45M Series B, bringing total funding to $68M; proceeds are earmarked for new GTM products, hiring, enterprise expansion, and opening a San Francisco office—timely for vendors supporting scale-up revenue operations.

Actively published a new GTM architecture/product narrative around moving from fragmented GTM tools to 'Intelligence-Led Revenue,' highlighting persistent 24/7 per-account agents plus Agent Inbox, Assistant, and Watchtower—useful opener around product/category momentum.

Tyler John posted that Actively's GTM team was hiring across 'pretty much every GTM role' in SF and NY, including remote Strategic AE roles, after closing multiple enterprise deals with 1,000+ rep revenue orgs—strong signal of sales-team expansion and enterprise demand.

request.query: Profile Tyler John, Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) at Actively AI. Return their work email (verified if available, otherwise the best-supported inference from reputable public sources), and 2-3 recent, specific "why now" signals a salesperson could open a cold email with — funding, launches, hiring, exec talks, migrations, or press from the last 6 months. Each signal must cite a source URL and date.

email.description: work email — verified when a data source has it, otherwise inferred from reputable public listings

signal.description: recent news for public cos, from Financial Datasets; else web

output.text: Email is inferred rather than directly revealed: RocketReach confirms Tyler John has an @actively.ai work email, while LeadIQ and RocketReach both report Actively's dominant email pattern as first@actively.ai, supporting tyler@actively.ai.
